---
title: "Related activities"
toc: true
number-sections: false
date-modified: last-modified
---

------

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

On this page, we're listing other coding and data-related activities at OSU that
Code Clubbers may be interested in.
[Let us know](/about.qmd#organizers) if you have a suggestion of something
to add here.

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

## Courses

- [PLNTPTH 5006 AU26: Practical Computing Skills for Omics Data](https://cfaes-bioinfo.github.io/pracs-au25/) --- _Jelmer Poelstra_

![](/img/PLNTPTH5006_flyer.png){fig-align="center" width="65%"}

- [HCS 7100 AU26: Data Visualization in R](https://www.rdataviz.com/) --- _Jess Cooperstone_, Tue 4:10–5:55 pm
- [STAT 5731 AU26: Introduction to R for Data Science](https://stat.osu.edu/courses/stat-5731)
- [MICRBIO 8161 AU26: Microbiome Informatics](https://microbiology.osu.edu/M8161)
- [ENT 6702: Entomological Techniques and Data Analysis](https://entomology.osu.edu/academics/courses)

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

## Upcoming workshops and other activities

- [R for Scientific Reproducibility](https://library.osu.edu/events/r-for-scientific-reproducibility-0)
  --- August 17, 2026, 9–3 pm\
  Free online-only [Carpentries](https://carpentries.org/) workshop co-organized
  by Code Club, Research Commons, and Imageomics.
  Registration required via the above link. Suitable for complete beginners.

- [Version Control with Git](https://library.osu.edu/events/version-control-with-git-0)
  --- August 21, 2026, 11–4 pm\
  Free online-only [Carpentries](https://carpentries.org/) workshop co-organized
  by Code Club, Research Commons, and Imageomics.
  Registration required via the above link. Suitable for complete beginners.

- [University Libraries Events overview](https://library.osu.edu/events)

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />

## Past workshops

These all have materials available online, and are free to use for self-study:

- [Using Generative and Agentic AI for Omics Data Analysis](https://cfaes-bioinfo.github.io/agentic-ai-workshop/)
  (July 2026)

- OSU Carpentries workshop organized by Code Club, Research Commons, and Imageomics
  on [R for Reproducible Research](https://osu-codeclub.github.io/carpentries-feb-2026/)
  (Feb 2026)

- [Amplicon Metabarcoding Workshop](https://jelmerp.github.io/metabar-ws24/)
  (Mar 2024)

<hr style="height:1pt; visibility:hidden;" />
